description: Medeloop builds AI tools for clinical research workflows, including real-world evidence analytics, grant discovery and proposal writing, and care-management assistance. Its website describes products for healthcare researchers, life sciences teams, and health systems.
summary: Medeloop exposes a documented OAuth-protected MCP server for Medeloop Grants at `https://medeloop-mcp.medeloop.ai/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on `medeloop.ai`.
